title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE LUCBAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE CITY OF BAGUIO TO GREGORIO DEL PILAR ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3662 / 53 OG No. 22, 8053 (November 30, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2019, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE LUCBAN ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE CITY OF BAGUIO TO GREGORIO DEL PILAR ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Lucban Elementary School in the City of Baguio is hereby changed to Gregorio del Pilar Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
